description_long: This is a light wood-finished bed frame with a modern, minimalist design. The frame features high side panels and a prominent headboard at one end, both with gentle curves for added style and comfort. The front of the bed includes two horizontal panels that may suggest the presence of under-bed storage drawers, though handles are not visible. The wood grain texture is consistent throughout, giving the bed a cohesive and natural appearance. The bed appears to be constructed from engineered wood or laminated particleboard, providing a sturdy yet lightweight structure. There is no visible mattress or bedding, and the sleeping surface is bare.
description: A light wood-finished, minimalist bed frame with high side panels, a headboard, and a bare sleeping surface.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, flat headboard and the full height of the side panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved side panel and the depth of the bed frame.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open sleeping area, high side panels, and two horizontal front panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the curved side panel and showing the headboard's thickness.
